case_title: MASON, CAROL (C/O C. RAVA) VS SANDHU, SHARANJIT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MASON, CAROL (C/O C. RAVA) AS TO DEFENDANT SANDHU, SHARANJIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF AUG-21-2001, GRANTED
